mapper.sql: select template_id, template_code, template_name, biz_type, prompt_content, version, status from sc_ai_prompt_template
mapper.select: and template_code = #{templateCode}and template_name like concat('%', #{templateName}, '%')and biz_type = #{bizType}and status = #{status} order by template_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into sc_ai_prompt_template(template_code, template_name, biz_type, prompt_content, version, status, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{templateCode}, #{templateName}, #{bizType}, #{promptContent}, #{version}, #{status}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.update: update sc_ai_prompt_template template_code = #{templateCode},template_name = #{templateName},biz_type = #{bizType},prompt_content = #{promptContent},version = #{version},status = #{status},update_by = #{updateBy},remark = #{remark},update_time = sysdate() where template_id = #{templateId}
mapper.delete: delete from sc_ai_prompt_template where template_id in #{templateId}
